overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western open-world game showing a cowboy character exploring a forested river valley. The character emerges from dense foliage, navigates rocky riverbank terrain, crosses a fallen log, and transitions into a pine forest trail.

events.description: character steps over and crosses a fallen log spanning the grassy bank

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along the riverbank, navigating around rocks and vegetation

entered.detail: thick green foliage partially obscuring the view at the start
flowing river with visible current and white water rapids
uneven terrain mixing grass, dirt, and large stones along the water
tall evergreen trees forming the forest edge
large stone outcrops rising beside the river
large horizontal dead tree trunk lying across the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view through dense bushes before emerging onto a forested riverbank. The cowboy character walks along the grassy shore beside flowing water, with tall pines on the left and rocky cliffs on the right. The character crosses a fallen log around the 12-second mark, continuing along the uneven terrain.

agents.ego_description: character continues walking along the rocky river edge, maintaining a steady pace beside the water

entered.detail: massive rocks scattered along the shoreline creating uneven footing

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the rocky riverbank, leaving the fallen log behind. The terrain becomes more stone-covered with large boulders scattered near the water's edge. The river remains close on the right, with cliff faces becoming more prominent, while the left side opens to reveal more of the pine forest interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between riverbank and dense forest interior

events.description: character stops on the rocks and stands observing the river flow
character turns away from the river and enters dense vegetation moving inland

agents.ego_description: character pauses on the rocky shore to look at the river, then turns and pushes through thick bushes into the forest

entered.detail: thick bushes and saplings blocking the path into the forest

segments.scene_description: The character stops on the rocky outcrop to observe the river, standing still for a moment. Around the 40-second mark, the character turns away from the water and enters dense undergrowth, transitioning from the open riverbank into the thicker forest interior. The river and cliffs disappear from view as the character moves inland through thick vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail through tall pines

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the dirt path through the pine forest, moving away from the river valley

entered.detail: clear dirt trail winding through the trees leading uphill
opening in the forest visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the thick bushes onto a defined dirt trail through the pine forest. The path winds forward through tall evergreen trees that create a canopy overhead, partially obscuring the sky. The character continues walking away from the river valley, heading toward a distant clearing visible through the trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a cowboy travels from a lush riverbank through rugged terrain and into the depths of a pine forest. It begins by pushing through dense bushes to reveal a grassy shore where the character walks between towering pines and rocky cliffs, crossing a fallen log as they navigate the uneven bank. As the terrain shifts, the ground becomes more stone-covered with large boulders scattered near the flowing water, while the cliff faces grow more prominent. The scene then transitions as the character pauses on a rocky outcrop before turning away from the river to plunge into thick undergrowth, causing the water and cliffs to disappear from view. Finally, the camera emerges from the vegetation onto a defined dirt trail that winds beneath a canopy of evergreen trees toward a distant clearing.
